articles.title: Rivian will deliver the first R2 SUVs on June 9
articles.summary: The company has finally set a date for the first customer deliveries of what CEO RJ Scaringe has said is "maybe the most important thing we’ve launched to date."

articles.title: Google engineer insider-traded search results on Polymarket, Feds allege
Triomics nabs $22M to bring oncology-specific AI to cancer centers
articles.summary: The Series B round was led by Battery Ventures.

articles.title: The crypto industry’s massive political war chest is starting to lean Republican ahead of midterms
In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
articles.summary: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.

articles.title: Wall Street gets new crypto rival after Texas bank completes regulatory pivot
Payroll startup Remote says it grew revenue 50% per employee without adding headcount
articles.summary: Payroll service provider Remote recently surpassed $300 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) and became cash-flow positive, thanks to a 50% increase in revenue per employee resulting from AI adoption.

articles.title: Elon Musk could become a top 5 corporate bitcoin holder if Tesla and SpaceX merge
UK Visa Portal exposed thousands of applicants’ passports and selfies — then called the lawyers on us
articles.summary: The third-party website exposed passports, selfies, and the location data of applicants who submitted their documents as part of the U.K. visa application process. Instead of fixing the issue, the website sent attorneys.

articles.title: Crypto Long & Short: How the GENIUS Act repriced bitcoin's monetary premium
Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans
articles.summary: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One” subscription brand.

articles.title: BIS project finds tokenization could make cross-border payments faster, safer
